projectScenarios.title: Instance binding
projectScenarios.setup: Bind SP_TEXT_INSTANCE as instance to Walls.

projectScenarios.title: Type binding
projectScenarios.setup: Bind SP_LENGTH_TYPE as type to Doors.

projectScenarios.title: Unbound SharedParameterElement
projectScenarios.setup: Keep SP_UNUSED in the project without a BindingMap entry.
projectScenarios.expected: Unbound row remains searchable by GUID.

projectScenarios.title: Duplicate names
projectScenarios.setup: Create SP_DUPLICATE_A and SP_DUPLICATE_B with the same visible name.
projectScenarios.expected: Two rows with different GUID and ElementId.

projectScenarios.title: Empty values
projectScenarios.setup: Leave at least two bound values empty.

projectScenarios.title: Filled values
projectScenarios.setup: Set different text values on at least three wall instances.
projectScenarios.expected: Filled count and display values are reported.

projectScenarios.title: Read-only values
projectScenarios.setup: Expose a read-only/reporting context for the target where supported.
projectScenarios.expected: Read-only is reported without attempted mutation.

projectScenarios.title: Visible schedule field
projectScenarios.setup: Add target field to a regular schedule.
projectScenarios.expected: Schedule, field, heading and position are reported.

projectScenarios.title: Hidden schedule field
projectScenarios.setup: Hide the target schedule field.

projectScenarios.title: Schedule filter
projectScenarios.setup: Use target field in a schedule filter.

projectScenarios.title: Schedule sorting
projectScenarios.setup: Use target field in sorting.

projectScenarios.title: Schedule grouping
projectScenarios.setup: Use target field in grouping.

projectScenarios.title: Calculated or combined schedule dependency
projectScenarios.setup: Create an opaque calculated/combined dependency near the target field.
projectScenarios.expected: Manual blocker if API cannot prove independence.

projectScenarios.title: Simple view filter
projectScenarios.setup: Create a ParameterFilterElement with one target rule.

projectScenarios.title: AND view filter
projectScenarios.setup: Create an AND tree with target and another rule.
projectScenarios.expected: Tree and other rule are preserved in analysis.

projectScenarios.title: OR view filter
projectScenarios.setup: Create an OR tree containing a target rule.
projectScenarios.expected: OR structure and confidence are reported.

projectScenarios.title: Mixed parameter rules
projectScenarios.setup: Create one filter tree containing target and rules of other parameters.
projectScenarios.expected: Target and other rules are separated.

projectScenarios.title: One filter on multiple views
projectScenarios.setup: Apply the same filter to at least three ordinary views.
projectScenarios.expected: Every view, visibility and overrides are reported.

projectScenarios.title: View template application
projectScenarios.setup: Apply the filter to a view template.

projectScenarios.title: Global parameter association
projectScenarios.setup: Associate a compatible element parameter with a global parameter.

projectScenarios.title: Loaded family with parameter
projectScenarios.setup: Load a family containing the target GUID.

projectScenarios.title: Loaded family without parameter
projectScenarios.setup: Load a family without the target GUID.

projectScenarios.title: Loaded family without instances
projectScenarios.setup: Load a family containing the GUID but place no instances.
projectScenarios.expected: Family presence still finds the GUID.

projectScenarios.title: In-place family
projectScenarios.setup: Create an in-place family in a bound category.

projectScenarios.title: Tag family
projectScenarios.setup: Load a tag family containing the target GUID.

projectScenarios.title: Uneditable family
projectScenarios.setup: Include a family unavailable to EditFamily.

projectScenarios.title: Workshared project
projectScenarios.setup: Create a workshared copy and make a dependency owned by another user.

projectScenarios.title: Embedded schedule
projectScenarios.setup: Use target field in an embedded schedule definition.

projectScenarios.title: RVT link exclusion
projectScenarios.setup: Link an RVT containing the same GUID.
projectScenarios.expected: Linked elements do not appear anywhere in the result.

projectScenarios.title: Dry run and post-verification
projectScenarios.setup: Use a safe target in one copy and an unexpected cascade target in another.
projectScenarios.expected: Safe plan succeeds; unknown deleted Id blocks execution and rollback preserves source.

familyScenarios.setup: Target exists without formula, dimension, association or annotation dependency.
Three types with distinct and empty values.
Dimension label is associated with target.
familyScenarios.expected: Dimension Id, view and reporting state.

familyScenarios.setup: Family parameter is associated with a geometry element parameter.
Nested family instance/type parameter is associated with target.
Formula references a similarly named parameter and same-name/different-GUID parameter.
Prepare a nested-family cycle or equivalent repeated-path guard case.
familyScenarios.expected: Recursion remains bounded and does not reopen a visited file.

familyScenarios.setup: Use a corrupt or deliberately unopenable RFA.
familyScenarios.expected: Error is isolated to this file and analysis continues.

familyScenarios.setup: Save the family in an older supported Revit version.
familyScenarios.expected: Current Revit upgrades in memory for analysis and never overwrites the source.
